data.content: Removed the settings sheet header/title block, restored the top content stack to start immediately with Repositories, and changed the Repositories/Agents headings from gradient-clipped text to solid text to eliminate the remaining washout. Verified with bun run lint (warnings only, 0 errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Pushed directly to origin/main as 537505c.
